behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths and component names referenced in tests (utils.svelte.ts, render.ts, Textbox.svelte, vite.config.ts, Gradio class, register_component, handle_copy, contextOptions) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes WHAT is broken (no-op override, missing functions, missing error handling, wrong prop name, wrong location) but not exact code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert specific implementation details: test_listener_registry requires `function listen(` declaration specifically, test_render_returns_event_helpers requires >=5 return fields, test_dispatcher_notifies_listeners forbids dispatchEvent — alternative valid fixes (e.g., arrow function `const listen =`, returning fewer fields, or using both dispatchEvent and listeners) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests are regex/string analysis on file contents (per the docstring: 'All checks use structural/regex analysis'); no code is executed since node_modules aren't installed.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each test asserts specific structural changes (removal of __GRADIO_BROWSER_TEST__, addition of try/catch around clipboard, contextOptions location) that a stub couldn't trivially pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All 5 issues from instruction (dispatcher override, render helpers, clipboard error handling, IconButtonWrapper prop, vitest permissions) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and each test has descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but localization within files is still required (e.g., 'Look at the constructor', 'the prop name used doesn't match').

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: vite.config.ts diff is localized to the browser/provider block, not a full rewrite.
